steps.prompt: Let's make something HUGE! Use the size button to make your object as big as it can go.
steps.feedback: Wow — that's enormous! The biggest it can be!
steps.failureFeedback: Keep going — make it even bigger!

steps.prompt: Now make it TINY — as small as it can go!
steps.feedback: So tiny! You can barely see it!
steps.failureFeedback: Keep going — make it even smaller!

steps.prompt: Now make it somewhere in the middle — not too big, not too small.
steps.feedback: Just right! Not too big, not too small.
